    Package Description
    org.neuroml1.model

    org.neuroml1.model.util  
  • Classes in org.neuroml1.model.morph used by org.neuroml1.model 
    Class Description
    Cell
    Definition of a cell.
  • Classes in org.neuroml1.model.morph used by org.neuroml1.model.morph 
    Class Description
    Cable
    Definition of a cable.
    CableGroup
    Definition of a cable group.
    CableGroup.Cable
    Java class for anonymous complex type.
    Cell
    Definition of a cell.
    Cell.Cables
    Java class for anonymous complex type.
    Cell.CellBody
    Java class for anonymous complex type.
    Cell.Segments
    Java class for anonymous complex type.
    Cell.Spines
    Java class for anonymous complex type.
    Cells
    Collection of all cells.
    Feature
    The group of things allowed in features.
    FreePoints
    A set of varicosities or synaptic connections.
    InhomogeneousParam
    Definition of a parameter which varies along a cable group.
    InhomogeneousParam.Distal
    Java class for anonymous complex type.
    InhomogeneousParam.Proximal
    Java class for anonymous complex type.
    Morphology
    The main element which details the neuronal morphology.
    Morphology.Features
    Java class for anonymous complex type.
    Morphology.GroupDetails
    Java class for anonymous complex type.
    Morphology.PropertyDetails
    Java class for anonymous complex type.
    Path
    Possibly branching histological structures.
    Segment
    Defines the smallest unit within a possibly branching structure, such as a segment of a dendrite or axon.
    Spine
    A spine with location, shape, and direction.
    SpineShape
    Java class for SpineShape.
  • Classes in org.neuroml1.model.morph used by org.neuroml1.model.util 
    Class Description
    Morphology
    The main element which details the neuronal morphology.
